panels.description: Wide shot: The narrator stands silhouetted against a murky, soot-filled horizon looking over a ruined landscape, reflective expression, muted sepia tones, atmospheric lighting.

bubbles.text: The world had changed in an instant. A silent, heavy dread hung in the air.

panels.description: Wide shot: A ruined railway line twisting like metal ribbons through a grimy, ash-covered cityscape. People wander like ghosts in the background, charcoal sketches style.

bubbles.text: The tracks were torn like paper. Everywhere, the faces of the people mirrored the ruin of their homes.

panels.description: Medium shot: Contrast between a patch of untouched, vibrant pine trees and the charred, blackened nursery grounds surrounding them. The narrator is visible in the foreground, looking down at withered plants.

bubbles.text: Only a few pines remained, unnaturally spared in a desert of black ash.

panels.description: Medium shot: The narrator stands before his home, his hand hovering over the shattered door frame. Dramatic lighting, dark shadows, look of profound shock.

bubbles.text: I reached the threshold... and my heart stopped.

panels.description: Close up: The interior of his room, looking at the desk with the scattered, incomplete work on the cylinder. High contrast lighting, intense emotional despair.

bubbles.text: Everything I had built... my research... abandoned to the dust. The end of all my thoughts.
